caption: The video appears to be a segment from a show called "Focus with Margaret Harrington," featuring a discussion on climate crisis poems titled "No More Time" by Greg Delanty. The split-screen format shows two individuals engaged in conversation. On the left, an older woman with short blonde hair and red earrings is seen speaking, while on the right, an older man with glasses and a beard gestures expressively with his hands, emphasizing his points as he speaks. The background of the man's side includes a blue wall with some framed pictures and a sign that reads "OPEN." The overall setting suggests a serious and thoughtful dialogue about environmental issues, likely aimed at raising awareness and encouraging action.
